title: language
text: language Specify the language used by the Sybase SQL Server for error messages. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = language LanguageName Arguments LanguageName —name of one of the supported languages. Description If the specified language is not available, the Sybase SQL Server uses the default language for the server. Changing the language can also affect the format for dates, depending on the default date format for the language. The default is us_english , and the default Sybase date format is mdy . Example: language USYS$SYB_PARAMS = language french Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
